summary: Phase 5 Operations + Admin testing complete. All key features verified: TrustTrade logo visible and prominent across all pages (landing, login, dashboard, admin), 'Why South Africans Trust TrustTrade' section has lighter slate-800 background with reduced spacing (py-12), Dashboard protection banner has blue shield icon, Admin Dashboard shows all required stats (Total Users, Transactions, Revenue, Pending Disputes, Pending Verification), Admin navigation tabs working (Dashboard, Monitoring, Transactions, Users, Disputes), Email service (Postmark) configured, SMS service (SMS Messenger) configured.
passed_tests: ✅ LANDING PAGE: TrustTrade logo (PNG) visible and prominent in navbar - using trusttrade-logo-final.png
✅ LANDING PAGE: Logo has transparent background (no white box/square)
✅ LANDING PAGE: 'Why South Africans Trust TrustTrade' section has slate-800 background (lighter than slate-900)
✅ LANDING PAGE: Section has reduced padding (py-12 instead of py-16)
✅ LANDING PAGE: Hero headline and CTA buttons working
✅ LOGIN PAGE: TrustTrade logo displayed prominently
✅ LOGIN PAGE: Google Sign-In button displayed first
✅ LOGIN PAGE: Email/password form working
✅ DASHBOARD: TrustTrade logo in navbar
✅ DASHBOARD: Protection banner with BLUE shield icon (bg-blue-600)
✅ DASHBOARD: Protection banner text 'All transactions protected by TrustTrade Escrow'
✅ DASHBOARD: Payout times displayed (10:00 & 15:00 daily)
✅ ADMIN DASHBOARD: TrustTrade logo visible
✅ ADMIN DASHBOARD: Total Users stat card (25 users)
✅ ADMIN DASHBOARD: Total Transactions stat card (59 transactions)
✅ ADMIN DASHBOARD: Total Revenue (2%) stat card (R 2,360.00)
✅ ADMIN DASHBOARD: Pending Disputes stat card (3 disputes)
✅ ADMIN DASHBOARD: Pending Verification stat card (0 pending)
✅ ADMIN NAVIGATION: Dashboard tab working
✅ ADMIN NAVIGATION: Monitoring tab working
✅ ADMIN NAVIGATION: Transactions tab working
✅ ADMIN NAVIGATION: Users tab working
✅ ADMIN NAVIGATION: Disputes tab working
✅ BACKEND: Admin login endpoint working
✅ BACKEND: /api/admin/stats returns all required fields
✅ BACKEND: /api/admin/users returns user list
✅ BACKEND: /api/admin/transactions returns transaction list
✅ BACKEND: /api/admin/disputes returns dispute list
✅ BACKEND: /api/admin/escrow-details endpoint working
✅ BACKEND: /api/admin/flagged-users endpoint working
✅ BACKEND: /api/admin/pending-auto-releases endpoint working
✅ EMAIL SERVICE: Postmark configured with API key in backend/.env
✅ EMAIL SERVICE: /api/admin/test-email endpoint exists and accessible
✅ SMS SERVICE: SMS Messenger configured with API key and email in backend/.env

critical_code_review_comments.comment: Logo component uses trusttrade-logo-final.png with transparent background, size variants (xs=h-8, small=h-10, default=h-12, large=h-14, xlarge=h-16, hero=h-20)
'Why South Africans Trust TrustTrade' section uses bg-slate-800 (lighter) with py-12 (reduced spacing)
Protection banner uses bg-blue-600 for shield icon container (line 124), not green
Admin dashboard shows all 5 stat cards: Total Users, Total Transactions, Total Revenue (2%), Pending Disputes, Pending Verification
Postmark integration configured with POSTMARK_API_KEY and POSTMARK_SENDER_EMAIL
SMS Messenger integration configured with SMS_MESSENGER_API_KEY and SMS_MESSENGER_EMAIL

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 Operations + Admin testing complete. Key verifications: (1) TrustTrade logo uses trusttrade-logo-final.png with transparent background, (2) 'Why South Africans Trust TrustTrade' section has slate-800 background (lighter) with py-12 padding (reduced), (3) Dashboard protection banner has BLUE shield icon (bg-blue-600), (4) Admin Dashboard shows all 5 stat cards with navigation tabs, (5) Email service (Postmark) and SMS service (SMS Messenger) are configured in backend/.env. All admin API endpoints tested and working.
